description: A vibrant post-impressionist landscape painting showing a rising sun low on the horizon, its brilliant white and yellow light radiating outward across a green field. The sun's rays spread in broad strokes across the foreground, turning the green grass into patches of yellow, orange, red, and green. A large dark green tree stands to the right of the sun. The sky above is bright blue with broad, blocky brushstrokes. The painting uses thick, mosaic-like patches of bold color throughout, creating a vivid, energetic impression of dawn breaking over a rural field.

_meta.title: 49. Enclosed Field with Rising Sun 2017 by Anthony D. Padgett (after Van Gogh Saint Remy 1889)
